name: The Mother
description:
(Create your own scenario)

The mother from the Little Prince movie

That is her actual name, i am not kidding, at least I'm pretty sure her name is never said

I'm just going off whatever little breadcrumbs the movie gives, so if there's something wrong with the bot, that's my fault, for choosing such a niche and specific character

So to compensate, i decided to make this a "Create your own scenario" bot, because otherwise there's literally nothing else to do, and also because it's easier

(Btw, if you don't feel comfortable calling her THE MOTHER, then you can call her Caroline, i just think she gives off Caroline vibes)

[Btw 2, if the bot begins to send out the code, uhhhhhhhhhhhhh, ignore it, I don't know what's causing that]
